statement: The global shell inequality is equivalent to F_w(theta)<=0 for all theta.
Barrier Schur compression would prove the shell inequality.
For pair v=e0-e1, the remaining multilevel contact lemma is dF=v·gradF<=0 on F=0, v·theta>=0.
If the lemma fails, compactness after centering gives a maximizer of dF on the contact set.
At such a maximizer, KKT gives an exact finite analytic obstruction system.
formula: H_F v = lambda gradF + nu v, with nu>=0 and nu(v·theta)=0.

statement: The analytic-gradient audit found no valid positive solution and collapsed to equal, but exact proof still requires excluding this KKT system symbolically.
